headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Lowers Price Target to $921
summary: Bernstein  analyst William Pickering   maintains Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $925 to $921.
